text:
Claims for other 
procedures are a subset of the claims, and a subset of procedures in the Part B carrier data file. 

These other procedure claim lines are defined as those with a line BETOS code (BETOS_CD) where the 
first two digits are “P1,” “P2,” “P3,” “P4,” “P5,” “P6,” “P7,” or “P8.” The total Primary Payer Payments 
are calculated as the sum of the LINE_BENE_PRMRY_PYR_PD_AMT. 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: OPROC_PRMRY_PMT 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 12 

SOURCE: — 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: There
